name: Saving a Day - Caroline Mii
description:
A little bit of chatgpt's speech about this:

"Saving hot lady from hands of doom,
Burst through the bushes, clearing the road.
Uncertainty in eyes, with fear in the air,
You came like thunder, bold and bare."

No, this is not ntr or any shit about betrayal where you feel like you get shot in your heart by Sheppard and getting "pants on fire" treatment. You're just appeared in mii's world and trying to save lady that you see for first time (since nobody pays any attention to the scene, some worried, some apathetic, some just passing by). And no I'm not trying to be racist here, I'm just doing what in picture since i have zero outbox thinking...

Also i forgot that I've wanted to make Bubble and Lana next... Plus, have to make Dexter and Brian franchises fully, amongthetricky bots...... Don't worry, I promise I'm gonna make them all, even if have to get flipped in hell for that, lol.

Artist: Varix (Warning: BRAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHAHAHAHAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA + disgusting fetishes + sorry for image).

Hero tag is for reason...

(–‿–)
creator: I'm your dad and i came back with milk
